t3AccessRule: May bid on Tier 3 assets once you own at least one Tier 2 asset.
selectionRule: Available to all players at game start. Auctioned with minimum bid $0.
replacementRule: Replaced on bankruptcy (reselect from available CEOs) or via specific card effects.

abilities.description: Roll d6 each year during your personal turn. On 4–6, earn +$1 bonus income on top of your base $1.
Held personal event cards may be sold for $1 each at any time during your settlement phase.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Starter asset — does not occupy an asset slot. Discarded when first market asset is purchased. Passive reassignment: once on discard, transfer the +1 income bonus to your first purchased asset.

starterAsset.flavourText: It pays the bills. For now.

flavourText: Still figuring out how money works.

t3AccessRule: May bid on Tier 3 assets once you own at least one Tier 2 asset.
selectionRule: Available to all players at game start. Auctioned with minimum bid $0.
replacementRule: Replaced on bankruptcy (reselect from available CEOs) or via specific card effects.

abilities.description: Earn $3 base income per year regardless of assets owned. This income is fully taxable — you must offset it with loan draws or pay 50% tax on the net amount above $1.
Once per game: before the auction phase, force a full market refresh — discard all 4 current market cards and replace them with 4 new draws. Announce before any bids are placed.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Starter asset — high income, moderate loan capacity. Passive reassignment: once on discard, transfer +1 income bonus to your first purchased FINANCE or REAL_ESTATE asset.

flavourText: I have a very important meeting. About money.

t3AccessRule: May bid on Tier 3 assets once you own at least one Tier 2 asset.
selectionRule: Available to all players at game start. Auctioned with minimum bid $0.
replacementRule: Replaced on bankruptcy (reselect from available CEOs) or via specific card effects.

abilities.description: Once per year during the value update phase: after rolling any one of your asset value update dice, you may reroll it and take the new result. You must take the new result — you cannot revert to the original.
If the rerolled result is strictly lower than the original roll, roll a d6. On a 1, gain +1 stress immediately. The house always wins eventually.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Starter asset — volatile, zero income, high ceiling. Passive reassignment: once on discard, the reroll ability may be applied to one chosen TECHNOLOGY or MEDIA asset you own for the remainder of the game.

starterAsset.flavourText: The deck was stacked. You shuffled it differently.

flavourText: The house always wins. I am the house.

t3AccessRule: May bid on Tier 3 assets at any time — does not require owning a Tier 2 asset first. This is the Visionary's unique privilege.
selectionRule: Available to all players at game start. Auctioned with minimum bid $0.
replacementRule: Replaced on bankruptcy (reselect from available CEOs) or via specific card effects.

abilities.description: May bid on Tier 3 assets in the auction at any time, without needing to own a Tier 2 asset first. The Visionary does not wait for prerequisites.
At the end of any year in which your total asset value did not increase compared to the start of that year, roll a d6. On a 1, gain +1 stress. Stagnation is existential.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Starter asset — high variance, zero income. Passive reassignment: once on discard, transfer the T3 access privilege to one owned TECHNOLOGY or ENERGY asset — that asset counts as unlocking T3 access for integration bonus purposes.

flavourText: We're not building a company. We're building a legacy.

t3AccessRule: May bid on Tier 3 assets once you own at least one Tier 2 asset.
selectionRule: Available to all players at game start. Auctioned with minimum bid $0.
replacementRule: Replaced on bankruptcy (reselect from available CEOs) or via specific card effects.

abilities.description: Death roll threshold is 8 instead of 6. You must reach stress 8 before any death rolls begin. Extremely hard to kill — but you earn less and grow more slowly than aggressive CEOs.
Loan repayment rolls of 5 also trigger the free loan removal (not just 6). The Bureaucrat has filed the right forms. Lenders comply.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Starter asset — near-zero growth, high income, good loan capacity. The safest starter in the game. Passive reassignment: once on discard, transfer +2 base loan capacity to your first purchased REAL_ESTATE or MANUFACTURING asset.

flavourText: I've filed for an extension on that.

t3AccessRule: May bid on Tier 3 assets once you own at least one Tier 2 asset.
selectionRule: Available to all players at game start. Auctioned with minimum bid $0.
replacementRule: Replaced on bankruptcy (reselect from available CEOs) or via specific card effects.

abilities.description: Whenever you win a forced sale auction (any asset being sold under duress by another player), pay $1 less than your winning bid (minimum $0). Gain –1 stress. The Raider profits from collapse.
Once per year before the auction phase begins: look at the top 3 cards of the market deck without revealing them to other players. You may leave them in any order.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Starter asset — moderate risk, moderate income. Passive reassignment: once on discard, transfer the forced-sale discount and –1 stress ability to any owned FINANCE or MANUFACTURING asset.

starterAsset.flavourText: Bought it for nothing. It was worth exactly that. For now.

flavourText: I don't create value. I acquire it.

t3AccessRule: May bid on Tier 3 assets once you own at least one Tier 2 asset.
selectionRule: Available to all players at game start. Auctioned with minimum bid $0.
replacementRule: Replaced on bankruptcy (reselect from available CEOs) or via specific card effects.

abilities.description: Your first $2 of income each year is always tax-free (instead of the standard $1 free). The Attorney knows which forms to file.

Once per year during the tax phase: you may treat one loan draw made this year as if it were made against any other owned asset — even one that did not actually receive the loan. This allows income from any single asset to be fully offset regardless of which asset has available capacity.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Starter asset — steady income, flat growth. Passive reassignment: once on discard, transfer the +$2 tax-free threshold to your first purchased FINANCE or REAL_ESTATE asset for one year.

flavourText: It's not tax avoidance. It's tax optimisation. There's a difference. Legally.

t3AccessRule: May bid on Tier 3 assets once you own at least one Tier 2 asset.
selectionRule: Available to all players at game start. Auctioned with minimum bid $0.
replacementRule: Replaced on bankruptcy (reselect from available CEOs) or via specific card effects.

abilities.description: Once per year immediately after the global event card is drawn: you may adjust the GMI by +1 or –1 before any asset values are updated. Announce your adjustment publicly. The Lobbyist shapes the environment.
Whenever a REGULATORY or STRESS_EVENT global event card is drawn, you may choose to ignore its stress effect entirely — it does not add stress to you this year. You have friends in the right places.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Starter asset — steady, moderate income, insulated from regulatory events. Passive reassignment: once on discard, transfer the GMI adjustment ability to one ENERGY or MANUFACTURING asset for one use.

starterAsset.flavourText: The meeting never happened. The outcome did.

flavourText: The policy was going to pass anyway. I just helped it along.

t3AccessRule: May bid on Tier 3 assets once you own at least one Tier 2 asset.
selectionRule: Available to all players at game start. Auctioned with minimum bid $0.
replacementRule: Replaced on bankruptcy (reselect from available CEOs) or via specific card effects.

abilities.description: Held personal event cards may be sold for $2 each instead of $1. Your personal brand adds a premium to everything.
Whenever your stress increases from any source, your highest-value owned MEDIA_ENTERTAINMENT asset gains +1 current value immediately. Stress is content. Controversy is currency.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Starter asset — volatile, zero income, entirely dependent on public attention. Buzz die applies. Passive reassignment: once on discard, transfer the stress-to-value conversion to your first purchased MEDIA_ENTERTAINMENT asset.

starterAsset.flavourText: The content is the asset. The asset is the content.

flavourText: Every crisis is a content opportunity. Every bankruptcy is a redemption arc.

t3AccessRule: May bid on Tier 3 assets once you own at least one Tier 2 asset.
selectionRule: Available to all players at game start. Auctioned with minimum bid $0.
replacementRule: Replaced on bankruptcy (reselect from available CEOs) or via specific card effects.

abilities.description: Whenever you activate a vertical integration bonus (2-of-3 or full-stack), you may also activate any one cross-industry synergy you qualify for on the same asset at the same time — no additional asset required. The Operator finds efficiencies others miss.
All vertical integration stress reduction bonuses (printed as '–1 stress' on integration effects) are doubled — they reduce your stress by 2 instead of 1. Building coherent portfolios is what you do.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Starter asset — steady, moderate income, manufacturing-aligned. Passive reassignment: once on discard, transfer the doubled stress reduction bonus to your first purchased MANUFACTURING or REAL_ESTATE asset for one integration activation.

starterAsset.flavourText: The synergies are real. The savings are on a slide deck. The stress reduction is immediate.

flavourText: Every inefficiency is an opportunity. I own all of them.

t3AccessRule: May bid on Tier 3 assets once you own at least one Tier 2 asset.
selectionRule: Available to all players at game start. Auctioned with minimum bid $0.
replacementRule: Replaced on bankruptcy (reselect from available CEOs) or via specific card effects.

abilities.description: At game start, before the first auction round, place your starter asset into your asset slots as a full owned asset — it counts toward your 3-asset limit and occupies a real slot. You begin with a functional portfolio from round one. The starter asset's full rules apply including stress.

Your starter asset is never discarded when you purchase your first market asset — you keep it in your asset slot. You may voluntarily sell it like any other asset. The family doesn't let go of things easily.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: This starter asset is permanent — it occupies a full asset slot and is never discarded on first purchase. Higher base value and loan capacity than any other starter. Very low growth — old wealth preserves, it does not multiply.

starterAsset.flavourText: It was in the family for three generations. It will be borrowed against for one.

flavourText: I didn't build this. That's not the point. The point is it's mine.

t3AccessRule: May bid on Tier 3 assets once you own at least one Tier 2 asset.
selectionRule: Available to all players at game start. Auctioned with minimum bid $0.
replacementRule: Replaced on bankruptcy (reselect from available CEOs) or via specific card effects.

abilities.description: Once per year before the value update phase: declare one asset owned by any player (including yourself) as your 'short position'. If that asset's value decreases this year, gain $2 cash. If it increases, gain +1 stress. You are betting against someone. It might be yourself.
Whenever the GMI delta is negative this year (any CORRECTION, RECESSION, DEPRESSION, or STRESS_EVENT card), gain $1 cash at the start of the value update phase. Bad years are your business model.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Starter asset — inverted delta table. High rolls are bad; low rolls are good. This asset grows in bad times and falls in good ones. Zero income — this is a hedging instrument, not a business. Passive reassignment: once on discard, transfer the negative-GMI $1 bonus to your first purchased FINANCE asset.

starterAsset.flavourText: The table is set for everyone else. You're eating the tablecloth.

flavourText: I don't root for failure. I just profit from it. There's a difference. Financially.
